zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hayward於大約1426年出生在英國史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗時，他的父親William Hayward22歲，母親Jane Wilcox22歲。他於1444年與Lady. Elizabeth Brocton在英國史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1471年在英國史洛普爾塞頓 馬多可享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hayward于大约1426年出生在英国史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗时，他的父亲William Hayward22岁，母亲Jane Wilcox22岁。他于1444年与Lady. Elizabeth Brocton在英国史洛普爾斯坦頓 朗结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1471年在英国史洛普爾塞頓 馬多可享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hayward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Hayworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Heyworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hayward was born about 1426, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, his father, William Hayward, was 22 and his mother, Jane Wilcox, was 22. He married Lady. Elizabeth Brocton in 1444, in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1471, in Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hayward est né environ 1426, à Stanton Long, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Hayward, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Jane Wilcox, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady. Elizabeth Brocton en 1444, à Stanton Long, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé environ 1471, à Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hayward um 1426 in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hayward 22 und seine Mutter Jane Wilcox 22. Er hat 1444 in Stanton Long, Shropshire, England Lady. Elizabeth Brocton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb um 1471 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hayward è nato il circa 1426 nel Stanton Long, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Hayward, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Jane Wilcox, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady. Elizabeth Brocton nel 1444, nel Stanton Long, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1471, nel Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Haywardが約1426年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロングで生まれた時，父William Haywardは22歳，母Jane Wilcoxは22歳であった。1444年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ロングでLady. Elizabeth Broctonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は約1471年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアスットオン マッドオックで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hayward(이)가 대략 1426년 영국 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hayward(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Wilcox(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1444년 영국 슈럽실르 스탠턴 론그에서 Lady. Elizabeth Brocton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1471년 영국 슈럽실르 수턴 매독에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1426–about 1471: tany ho any amin'ny 1426–tany ho any amin'ny 1471

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hayward nasceu aproximadamente 1426, em Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hayward, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Jane Wilcox, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady. Elizabeth Brocton em 1444, em Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1471, em Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hayward родился около 1426 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Hayward было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Wilcox, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady. Elizabeth Brocton в 1444 г. в местности стантон лонг, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер около 1471 г. в местности суттон мэддокк, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.about 1426–about 1471: e tusa o le 1426–e tusa o le 1471

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hayward nació aproximadamente 1426, en Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Hayward, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jane Wilcox, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady. Elizabeth Brocton en 1444, en Stanton Long, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1471, en Sutton Maddock, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
